description: Lightweight deployment release for a TCGA/GDC STAR-Counts-scale bulk RNA-seq tumor-vs-adjacent-normal classifier, with input QC, scoring, threshold calibration, explanations, release validation, and compact external-validation artifacts. This software is research-only and is not intended for clinical diagnosis or patient management.
notes: Validated input boundary: GDC STAR-Counts-style log2(TPM+1) bulk RNA-seq matrices for TCGA/CPTAC-like tumor-vs-adjacent-normal contrasts. Direct hard calls on Toil/RSEM, GTEx, GEO, raw counts, FPKM, microarray, single-cell, or spatial data are not validated without pipeline-specific recalibration or refitting.
title: TCGA/GDC tumor-vs-normal RNA-seq classifier
